triggers.name: Enemy timer: Ancient: Lullaby of Shadow
triggers.pattern: ^You begin singing Ancient: Lullaby of Shadow(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))?\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m24s at level 50 (formula 7, cap 4 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Bard level 60. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Ancient: Lullaby of Shadow
triggers.pattern: ^Your Ancient: Lullaby of Shadow(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
